\raggedright\small\textit{All non-Planned results use synthetic or literature-derived baselines. QPSK EVM is an RF-quality proxy under SNR=40 dB — NOT a standard LR-FHSS PER. \caption{\label{tab:guard}Uncertainty-Aware Guard-Band Policy Comparison}
\begin{tabular}{lcccc}
\toprule
Policy & Guard Overhead & Missed Opp. Rate & Energy (J/opportunity) & Notes \\
\midrule
Fixed 30 ms (impl. lower bound) & 0.013\% & 1.00 & 0.07955 & Too small for SGP4 $\sigma$; 100\% miss \\
SGP4 3$\sigma$ ($\sigma$=1.5 s) & 2.41\% & 0.0005 & 0.09506 & Large overhead; near-zero miss \\
PGRL mean 3$\sigma$ ($\sigma$=0.2 s) & 0.51\% & 0.0005 & 0.174 & Uncalibrated uncertainty \\
PGRL uncertainty-aware ($\sigma$=16 ms) & 0.23\% & 0.0005 & 0.09665 & Calibrated $\sigma$; near-zero miss; minimal overhead \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\raggedright\small\textit{Energy model uses simplified RX=12 mA / TX=28 mA at 3.3 V. Actual IoT device consumption varies by radio state machine.}
